component.name: Apple Music for Linux
component.summary: Desktop player for the Apple Music web app

description.p: An unofficial desktop wrapper for the Apple Music web player, with full DRM playback support via Widevine. Not affiliated with or endorsed by Apple Inc.

ul.li: Floating mini player with album art, progress bar, and volume
Time-synced lyrics in a separate window
Dark mode that follows your desktop theme
Last.fm scrobbling and Discord Rich Presence

screenshot.caption: The mini player and time-synced lyrics window

description.p: Mini player, synced lyrics window, Discord Rich Presence, and Last.fm scrobbling.
